case_title: PUI HO TSANG VS. MICHAEL P BENEDIAN et al

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, PUI HO (CAROL) SERVED SEP-27-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-22-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE DEFENDANT MICHAEL P BENEDIAN; OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-06-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
